chunks.content: CCL may be extended to single male parents including unmarried, widower, and divorcee employees.
CCL may be granted at 100% leave salary for the first 365 days and 80% leave salary for the next 365 days.
Single female Government servants may avail CCL in six spells per calendar year. Other eligible Government servants may avail a maximum of three spells per calendar year.
Form II is used for giving prior intimation or seeking previous sanction under Rule 18(3) of the CCS (Conduct) Rules, 1964 for acquisition or disposal of movable property.

chunks.content: NIT Calicut issues Student ID Cards, Regular Faculty and Staff ID Cards, Ad-hoc and Contract Staff ID Cards, Pensioner ID Cards, and Visitor ID Cards.
All faculty, staff, and students must wear their identity cards at all times while on the NIT Calicut campus and produce them when requested by authorized personnel.
The Recruitment Rules for Non-Teaching staff in NITs were initially issued on 20 December 2017 following approval by the Council of NITSER.

The Ministry referred to its communication dated 20 February 2019 through which the recommendations of the Oversight Committee and the Recruitment Rules (2019) for Non-Teaching Staff of NITs were issued for implementation after approval by the respective Boards of Governors.
